name: Railroad Manager
short_description: Build tracks, drive trains, transport passengers and goods! Relaxed railway construction in retro style with a large campaign and countless missions and maps.
detailed_description:
Build tracks, run trains, transport passengers and goods, research technologies - and get rich! Ludetis Railroad Manager makes you the boss of a railway company and turns your PC into a country that wants to be paved with rails. Designed in the popular retro look and famous since many years on Android and now finally on PC!
For all fans of classic railway tycoon games!
Featuring a large, varied campaign with new maps and missions!
Intuitive gameplay just like in the good old tycoon days, 20+ authentic maps from different countries, 10+ missions per map, a 20+ chapter campaign and true-to-original vehicles. Climb the leaderboards and unlock achievements.
Additional vehicles can be unlocked with diamonds. Diamonds are awarded for leveling up in the game. This means that new game missions with better conditions are always possible, which are unlocked bit by bit! Including endless missions and procedurally generated maps!
